name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The Big Government political establishment was supposed to have this all sewn up by now.

But polls show the race for the Republican nomination for President of the United States is wide open.

And with the September 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline rapidly approaching, I'm not going to mince words.

This is by far THE most critical fundraising deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

**[So I'm counting on your IMMEDIATE action](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**.

The press and the Big Government establishment of BOTH parties are already sniffing around to see if my campaign has the grassroots support and resources it will take to surge to the top of the Republican Primary polls.

They know Americans have begun to zero in on the race for the White House with the launch of the Republican debates -- and are just now digging into candidates' records and plans.

And they know this is the last FEC reporting deadline before all candidates begin their massive end of year push to 2016.

As more punches are thrown, polls will change. This massive field of 15 Republican candidates is going to quickly start whittling down to just a handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge to the top.

But it's so critical I have a strong quarter. **[So I'm counting on your support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**.

From the very moment I launched my candidacy for the presidency of the United States, Democrats and their pals in the press have gone all-out to SMEAR me.

It hasn't worked.

Many polls show I'm the ONLY Republican candidate to beat leading Democrat Hillary Clinton in five key swing states President Obama won in both 2008 and 2012.

We have an unmatched and growing on-the-ground presence in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

Energy is sky-high as GOP loyalists and political newcomers step forward to "Stand With Rand" and fuel an exploding volunteer base.

These patriots are seeing firsthand that my campaign is the real deal.

You see, I didn't run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because I was "next in line" or some high-powered consultant thought I'd make a great candidate.

I had a great life as a physician back home in Kentucky -- a life I was sad to let go.

But I ran for political office because I felt it was time that good people stood up and fought for the America we so dearly love. I ran because I was worried about the future of our country.

I worried that the "land of the free" is becoming the land of the regulated, taxed and spied on.

I'm running for President because I'm still worried. And I know you are too.

Today, we're $18.3 TRILLION in debt. The Middle East is spiraling out of control.

Members of BOTH parties openly sneer at the constitutional liberties that have made our nation the greatest and freest on earth.

I believe we can right the ship.

I believe we can destroy the Washington Machine and make liberty and freedom the default position in Washington, D.C. -- instead of corruption, cronyism and bigger government.

But that can only happen with your help and generous financial support.

Unlike many of my opponents, my campaign isn't funded by a bunch of Wall Street fat-cats and special interests who are looking for special deals, breaks and bailouts.

I'm not "their guy," and I never will be. I'm yours.

**[And I'm counting on you to please stand with me during this most critical time](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**.

I'm running for President not to "be something" or because I need an ego boost. I'm running to restore America by ushering in real, bold limited-government reforms, including:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. My Fair and Flat Tax plan will blow up the tax code and start over, return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a whopping 10% and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C. who never have to face voters in a serious election;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO READ THE BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's in them;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals and poorer quality healthcare Americans are now experiencing;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in never-ending boom-bust economic cycles, corruption and cronyism;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting our religious liberties, the right to life, political speech, our gun rights and our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government spying.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

This race could not be more wide open. So every dollar counts.

With the September 30th FEC deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**?

I know it's a lot. But this is the most critical FEC deadline I've ever faced.

If it's just too much right now, **[please know whatever you can afford to contribute will help my campaign tremendously](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**.

This is the last FEC deadline before I begin my all-out push to 2016.

Every dollar you can give will help me pay for the critical travel bills for the campaign stops, bumper stickers, phone banks, U.S. mail, social media outreach and Internet and TV ads it will take to surge to the top.

So please give as much as you can. **[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or whatever you can afford at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**!

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

P.S. The September 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline is rapidly approaching. This is by far THE most critical fundraising deadline I've ever faced. PERIOD.

This massive field of 15 Republican candidates is going to quickly start whittling down to just a handful.

My campaign is laying the groundwork to surge to the top, but I must be able to count on your support. **[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)**!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562773:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562774:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562775:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30562776:sg9TLPmoN:m:1:879035888:E5F57FF244740EA3612558A44AB75DBE:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Ben Carson
subject: I will not back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30562763:sR7SLPm1N:m:1:876315805:CCFCF6A310F8CB37B8F608DA57F9FED2:r)
---

Peter,

If you've been following the latest "controversy" over my comments about Islam, you know the arrows are out for me.

[I will need your help to push back](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30562763:sR7SLPm1N:m:1:876315805:CCFCF6A310F8CB37B8F608DA57F9FED2:r), but I want you to know exactly where I stand. These are my beliefs and I will not back down:

Many parts of Sharia Law are not compatible with the U.S. Constitution. Under Sharia, homosexuals -- men and women alike -- must be killed. Women must be subservient. And people following other religions must be killed as well.

There are many peaceful Muslims who do not adhere to these beliefs. But until these tenets are fully renounced I cannot advocate any Muslim candidate for President.

I also can't advocate supporting Hillary Clinton for President by the way.

Because I shared my honest opinion, I've come under intense fire from the media, nearly every leading Democrat, and even some of my Republican peers.

The Council on American-Islamic Relations (CAIR) has called for me to drop out of the presidential race, saying I am "unfit to lead."

[**I will not back down -- but I need your help to push back right now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30562763:sR7SLPm1N:m:1:876315805:CCFCF6A310F8CB37B8F608DA57F9FED2:r)

Too many Americans have been persuaded to follow the Far Left's political correctness (PC) speech code, believing that if only we are extra careful to not offend anyone, we will achieve unity. This would not be unity -- it would be paralysis.

**Political correctness run amok is preventing us from speaking honestly about our challenges, our differences and our culture. It's dangerous and I will not abide by it.**

I'm not a politician with my finger in the wind, and running for President was not on my bucket list. So I'm not going to say whatever I need to say to get elected.

I am going to speak the truth as I know it, and do what I believe is right and just -- even if it makes some uncomfortable.

I believe deeply in every word of the U.S. Constitution and the Judeo-Christian values that form its foundation. As your President I would swear to preserve, protect and defend it.

The Far Left and even some of my Republican peers are trying to use this episode as a way to bring down my candidacy, but together we can emerge stronger than ever.

[**Please stand in support of our shared values and help me show the power of "We the People" by making a donation now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30562763:sR7SLPm1N:m:1:876315805:CCFCF6A310F8CB37B8F608DA57F9FED2:r)

Thank you for your time, your support, and your dedication to creating a better American future for the next generation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

subject: Debate Week Wrap-Up
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |

\- September 22 2015 -
Debate Week Wrap-Up

| Dear Peter Willis, Today a Morning Consult poll came out that shows me at 32%. [We are still number one](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-j/). South Carolina and Oklahoma: We are coming to you! Tomorrow, we will be in South Carolina speaking in Charleston at the South Carolina African American Chamber of Commerce and later in the day we will head to Columbia to participate in Senator Tim Scott's Town Hall. On Friday we will be at the Oklahoma State Fair in Oklahoma City. We love the people of Oklahoma – and they love Trump! [Here is a recent poll](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-t/) that shows we are leading in Oklahoma. Tickets can be reserved [**here**](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-i/). What a tremendous week we've had! On Monday we kicked off the week with a massive campaign rally in Dallas, Texas. The crowd in the arena was huge and energetic – it was great to meet the people of Texas and see that our message is taking hold. _
_
_The American Airlines Center in Dallas, TX_ After Dallas we headed to Long Beach, California on board the USS Iowa to do an event with Veterans for a Strong America. At the event in front hundreds of United States veterans I received this group's endorsement for my Presidential candidacy. I am the candidate who will Make America's Military Great Again! The next day, we were in Simi Valley for the CNN debate. If you haven't seen the polls, you should check them out. ([Drudge](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-d/), [NBC](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-h/), [Newsmax](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-k/), [Morning Consult](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-u/), [Zogby](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-o/)). We are in the lead in every poll – whether the media likes it or not.
_Aboard the USS Iowa on September 15_ Following the debate I released a policy paper on the [Second Amendment](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-b/). I believe the Second Amendment is a fundamental right for all law abiding American citizens and protecting that freedom is imperative. At the end of the week, we visited Rochester, New Hampshire for a town hall that more than 3,000 supporters attended. Then we wrapped up the weekend with two campaign stops in Iowa - Des Moines and [Urbandale](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-n/). In Des Moines we stopped at the Faith and Freedom Coalition. In Urbandale I spoke with high school students at their homecoming – it was a great campaign event and a reminder for everyone that we must [Make America Great Again](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-p/) for the sake of our children and their futures.
_Urbandale High School 's Homecoming_ We will be traveling all across America this fall. Can't wait to see you out there on the campaign trail.
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-fujelk-l-z)

Also, visit our website to [shop](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-x/) latest campaign merchandise, including the official Donald J. Trump [camo hat](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fujelk-drdiuiutjh-m/).

Fellow Conservative:

Too many establishment Republicans and leaders in Washington have let us down.

From ObamaCare, to illegal executive amnesty, to funding Planned Parenthood, surrender was always the first option.

As a result, our party's nominating contest is wide open as voters are rejecting the establishment candidates the media thought would cake walk to victory.

And the September 30th reporting deadline is our chance to send a clear message that my campaign has the grassroots muscle to win.

Fellow Conservative, this is the most important deadline I will face as a candidate, **[so I hope I can count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30573028:sB2LvPmNT:m:1:879035888:1A6BD279E7725ABA28CDB91F8108F23E:r)**.

Already, this past week my campaign has received a boost of momentum.

I've passed one test of organizational strength and grassroots support by winning the Mackinac Island straw poll in Michigan.

And in the last debate I turned in a strong performance by outlining my plan to take our country back by:

>>> Ending the IRS with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that will slash taxes for all Americans as everyone pays one low rate.

>>> Repealing ALL of ObamaCare.

>>> Kicking career politicians out of office with term limits.

>>> Stopping illegal NSA spying once-and-for-all.

I made it clear, if you like Big Government there will always be a Bush or a Clinton for you to pick from.

But I stood along on stage as the only candidate to defend ALL of the Bill of Rights.

So my campaign has prepared a new TV ad detailing my plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

By picking a candidate propped up by the same party establishment that failed to fight Barack Obama and the Democrats, our party is throwing our best chance in a generation to elect a President who will boldly champion our values.

With the September 30th deadline just one week away my campaign needs the resources to bust my message through the noise the media is generating.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What I'm about to tell you is unprecedented
body:
#
**[We have a chance to make history with potentially reaching 1 million online contributions to our campaign by next week's fundraising deadline. Please contribute $24.85, our average donation this past week, to help us try and reach this goal.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c071b/1895236796/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-million?refcode=em150923nd-avg")**
Something remarkable is happening. We are approaching a critical fundraising deadline next week, after which we will have to publicly report not just how much money our campaign has raised, but how many people have made a contribution to own a part of it.
This deadline gives our campaign the chance to make presidential election history. **We may be able to say that our supporters have made 1 million contributions online to our campaign. It's a stretch to reach that goal.** Yet I believe that it's possible to get there if we all come together.
Are you in to help us try?
**[Help us reach 1 million online contributions by next week's deadline. Please contribute $24.85, our average donation this past week, to our campaign to try and meet this unprecedented goal.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c071b/1895236796/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-million?refcode=em150923nd-avg")**
Having more than 1 million contributions would be absolutely, totally historic this early in an election. In the 2008 race, with all of his grassroots momentum and enthusiasm in his incredible campaign, President Obama did not reach more than 1 million contributions until after he won the Iowa caucuses.
The political media like to take fundraising deadlines like the one coming up next week and make it all about the grotesque amounts of money poured into our democracy. We'll see just how many Wall Street execs contributed how many millions of dollars to prop up the corrupt system that helps them get rich. They'll report on super PACs raking in potentially hundreds of millions of dollars from corporations and the ultra-wealthy.
What they're not counting on is our political revolution. Let's show that the number of people and the number of contributions people make is just as important as the money raised from the billionaire class.
**[Please chip in $24.85, our average donation this past week, to help reach our goal of 1 million online contributions by our fundraising deadline.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c071b/1895236796/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-million?refcode=em150923nd-avg")**
I cannot thank you enough for all of your support, dedication, and sacrifices for our campaign. We have shown that a political revolution is possible. Now let's show what we can do with it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c071b/1895236796/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/one-million?refcode=em150923nd-avg")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c07d4/1895236796/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c07d5/1895236796/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c07d2/1895236796/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2281/43f17890/59657a69/621c07d3/1895236796/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: George Pataki
subject: Scott Walker is out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7efffeb80a/ace65cf3c9/5205005b9c/sc=923eb

Dear Friend,

As you may have heard, Governor Scott Walker has decided to end his
campaign for president. He becomes the second candidate--along with
Governor Rick Perry--in the last two weeks to leave the race.

This creates a huge opportunity for us.

Like Governor Walker, I was a blue-state governor who worked across
party lines to get big things done for my state. That's exactly what
our next president needs to do. If you agree, I'm asking you to join
our campaign with a $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700
contribution today. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7efffeb80a/ace65cf3c9/8d14a19bc1/sc=923eb

A presidential campaign is a marathon, not a sprint. Since the start
of this campaign, we've seen a number of candidates rise and fall in
the polls. First it was Governor Walker and then it was Governor
Bush. Now Donald Trump is having his moment in the sun. But everybody
knows that Donald Trump will not--and should not--be our nominee.

Every campaign will have its moment in this long race for the
presidency. When our moment comes, we need to be ready. That's why
I'm asking you to make a $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or even
$2,700 contribution today. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7efffeb80a/ace65cf3c9/548f443f40/sc=923eb

Unlike some of the other candidates, I am building a campaign ready
to last all the way through 2016. It is built on the same
conservative principles--being lean, efficient, and focused--that I
implemented as governor and will as president.

The primaries are getting closer. Voters are starting to look for a
serious candidate who can defeat Hillary Clinton next November. We
need to make sure that, when voters give us a serious look, we have a
ground game ready to get out the vote in New Hampshire and all of the
early primary states.

To do that, we need your help. Please contribute $10, $20, $50, $100,
$500, $1,000, or even $2,700 today. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/7efffeb80a/ace65cf3c9/6fbcb36fbe/sc=923eb

Thank you for all that you do, and for being part of this exciting
election.

Very truly yours,

George Pataki

**RE** : End of Quarter Campaign Update
**DATE** : September 23, 2015

_Summary_ :

The Washington spin machine is desperate to tear down and destroy this campaign.

But experience shows that presidential campaigns that are built on a strong foundation and practice strong fundamentals are the ones around when the snow begins to fly.

_Consider_ :

In 2012, according to a University of Iowa poll, Herman Cain was at 37% on October 19th. On caucus day in January, Herman Cain got 0% of the vote. In fact, many of the early frontrunners like Michele Bachmann, Rick Perry and Newt Gingrich fizzled on caucus day in Iowa.

But the final contenders were the ones who put grunt work in early in the campaign and saw that work pay off in the end.

That's why, from day one, we built a campaign designed to withstand the day-to-day ups and downs and build the grassroots force needed to win the Republican nomination.

And it's beginning to pay off.

As Breitbart recently noted, "Rand Paul has built one of the most impressive presidential campaign operations for any of the so-called outsider GOP candidates in 2016, pulling together a consortium of heavy-hitting politicos, grassroots leaders and a team that's designed to go the distance all the way . . ."

Starting with your strong performance in last week's debate, we've seen a sudden rush of momentum these past few days.

In the days since, we've been getting our biggest crowds of the campaign -- which further proves that the American people are looking for a bold, transformational candidate like Rand Paul.

_Campaign Surging_ :

Saturday night, Rand won the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference straw poll.

Traditionally, the straw poll held at the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference has been one of the strongest predictors of who will emerge as the Republican nominee.

In 2007, John McCain began his comeback in the polls at Mackinac Island, which ended with his primary nomination. Mitt Romney won Michigan in 2008 and in 2012 after winning Mackinac in 2007 and 2011.

Just about all the candidates went to speak and campaigned hard at the event -- Fiorina, Kasich, Cruz, Bush, etc.

But this wasn't our first major straw poll victory.

Earlier this year, Rand Paul won the straw poll at the Conservative Political Action Committee (CPAC), a gathering of activists held outside of Washington, D.C.

These two victories speak to our organizational strength and the passion of our supporters.

_Endorsements_ :

As our campaign continues to surge, more and more public officials and Republican Party activists across the nation are publicly supporting Rand Paul.

After last week's debate performance, South Carolina Congressman Mick Mulvaney (R-SC) endorsed Rand Paul -- making Rand the first Presidential candidate to be endorsed by a member of South Carolina's congressional delegation.

Representative Mulvaney joins Rep. Justin Amash (R-MI), Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY), Rep. Cynthia Lummis (R-WY), Rep. Raul Labrador (R-ID), Rep. Curt Clawson (R-FL), Rep. Ted Yoho (R-FL) and other members of Congress in publicly endorsing Rand.

Following his impressive performance at the CNN Republican Primary Debate last night, Rand Paul also received the endorsement of 25 first in the nation primary voters.

This totals 250 endorsements for Rand Paul for President by New Hampshire public officials, business leaders, and activists.

This on-the-ground force in New Hampshire cannot -- and will not -- be rivaled by any candidate in the lead up to the Primary.

_Exploding Volunteer Base_ :

Our campaign has assembled teams in key early states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada that are laying the groundwork both nationally and in these early states that will pay dividends when voting begins in February of 2016.

We have an unmatched and growing on-the-ground presence in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

In New Hampshire alone, we have assembled a 150-person leadership team that spans all 10 counties and surpasses what most campaigns end up with when Election Day has already passed.

Energy is sky-high as GOP loyalists and political newcomers step forward to "Stand With Rand" and fuel an exploding volunteer base.

_Growing Youth Movement_ :

Last month, we launched a student organization effort across the nation with the goal of establishing 300 new Students for Rand Paul college chapters within 30 days.

Thanks to the hard work of staff and volunteers, we surpassed the set goal and established 339 new Students for Rand (SFR) chapters throughout all 50 states.

These Students for Rand chapters will recruit new supporters, organize events, and mobilize students to vote for Rand Paul.

The mission is to build a youth army and establish an SFR chapter on every college campus in the United States.

This will prove to be an invaluable asset as energetic, passionate volunteers are the lifeblood of any campaign.

_Grassroots Driven_ :

Unlike many of Rand's opponents, our campaign isn't funded by Wall Street cronies and special interest groups.

They're out looking for special deals, breaks and bailouts -- something Rand Paul refuses to offer.

Our campaign has a powerful weapon that money can't buy.

And that's the support of hundreds of thousands of Americans across the country who are fed up with business as usual in Washington.

Our campaign's average contribution is just over $46.

_Conclusion_ :

The Washington spin machine is very consistent in their efforts to tear down the candidates who are strongest against Hillary Clinton and pump up those candidates who are weakest against Hillary Clinton.

Poll after poll has shown that Rand Paul is the strongest candidate to defeat Hillary Clinton because he simultaneously invigorates the GOP base while reaching out to Independents and disaffected Democrats.

There is nothing scarier to liberals than Rand Paul as the Republican nominee.

The Washington Machine doesn't want Rand to take on Hillary.

That is why the DNC has attacked Rand Paul more than they have attacked any other GOP candidate.

That is also why the media is trying to destroy his campaign at every opportunity.

The good news is, their attacks aren't working.

But the September 30th End of Quarter financial deadline is fast approaching.

This is perhaps the most important financial deadline of the entire campaign.

With Rand's strong debate performance, straw poll victories, and key endorsements, the press and the Big Government establishment will be pouring through our financial reports looking for any sign of weakness.

They're desperate to find anything they can to help push their narrative that the American people must accept the status quo.

The bottom line is this race will be decided by boots on the ground in key early states.

If our campaign can have a strong showing these last few days before the September 30th End of Quarter deadline, it'll help catapult Rand's momentum even further.

And Rand Paul will be the nominee. And he will beat Hillary Clinton.

Sincerely,

Doug Stafford
Chief Strategist, Rand Paul for President

subject: The latest, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071570:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| | | | Peter,It's been a busy week for Marco on the campaign trail, building on his great performance at the CNN debate last week. We've had a ton of great coverage on [MarcoRubio.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071569:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r) that you may have missed. Here's an update on what we've featured recently:
---
| |
---
| MarcoRubio.com should be your go-to source for summaries of last Wednesday's debate and the overwhelmingly positive reaction Marco got. [**We collected reactions in tweets and cable-news clips:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071568:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r) things like "clear winner," "Rubio's show," "crushing it," "home runs all night." We also released this [**highlight reel of Marco's best moments and the reactions:**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071567:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071566:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| |
---
| We've got [**another new video,**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071565:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r) this one about the connection between Marco's background -- his parents and the hard work they put in to make his journey possible -- and the urgent need for new leadership to help preserve and expand the American Dream. It's great stuff:
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071564:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| |
---
| With news breaking over the last week that Russian planes and tanks are now based in Syria, as Marco warned at the debate, he's been touting his plans to confront Russia's expansionism. We featured Marco's op-ed in _National Review_ , which explains what Russia's up to and what we can do about it. He's been getting some credit for his ideas on this topic. We were proud to note that **Gary Kasparov, the chess legend turned democracy activist and Putin opponent,[ says Marco is the right candidate to lead on foreign policy:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071563:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071562:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| | | | |
---
| Marco campaigned in Georgia earlier this week, drawing a wall-to-wall, enthusiastic crowd in Atlanta - more than 300 people! Even better: The trip as accompanied by the announcement of some endorsements from great Georgia conservative leaders: Congressman Austin Scott, and a group of state legislators the _Atlanta Journal Constitution_ calls "up-and-coming Georgia lawmakers." [**Read more about it here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071561:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)
---
| |
---
| There's no doubt that the federal government's byzantine regulations hold back America's economy, wage growth and job creation. Fixing that is a key part of allowing the economy in the 21st century, and Marco's been talking for a while about one way to do that: a national regulatory budget. Under a regulatory budget, for every new dollar in costs federal regulators want to impose, they have to undo a dollar in other costs. It would help roll back the burden the federal government places on our economy and restore some oversight of our overgrown regulatory system to Congress. [**More on how it works here.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071560:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r) The campaign website is a crucial way for us to help get Marco's optimistic, ideas-oriented message across. We have more content on the way, so please keep checking [**MarcoRubio.com.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071569:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r) Thanks for all your support! Team Marco
---
| | [**DONATE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44071559:JIqL7TLjN:m:1:1349778030:B8318F10A4840E632C4AF7B163184A40:r)

body:
Friend,

The Iowa campaign team is working on a special project that is instrumental to the success of the Rand Paul for President campaign in the Iowa Caucuses.

Over the next four months, this will be one of the 2-3 most important projects we undertake.

I can't discuss the details in this email, but if you choose to help, this is what it will require from you:

• The ability and willingness to make phone calls.

• 1-2 hours per week over a 10 week period. If you cannot help every week, that's fine. If you are able to put in more than a couple hours per week, that is appreciated as well.

You will need a phone and a computer.

You will **_NOT_** need to leave your home to assist with this mission-critical project.

**[If you are willing to help, please go here and complete this form](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30577970:sQkofPmN6:m:1:879035888:8506525564C41BD6B4FE6B43BD6AB23C:r)**.

To volunteer with most calls made each week

500 Calls

Jonathan Van Norman
Iowa Political Director

We're following up with our most loyal supporters and I was told to reach out to you.

[**If you chip in $**10** to confirm your Jeb! 2016 Membership within the next 24 hours, not only will you receive your official 2016 Jeb!
